title: Tyk Gateway - Native OTLP Metrics
description: Showcases native OTLP metrics exported directly from Tyk Gateway (TT-16688). Key differentiator: latency attribution splitting Total = Gateway + Upstream, eliminating the need for Tyk Pump for metrics use cases.

panels.title: Request Rate
panels.description: Current request rate across all APIs (from native OTLP counter tyk_api_requests_total)

panels.title: HTTP Error Rate
panels.description: Percentage of requests returning 5xx status codes

panels.title: P95 Total Latency
panels.description: 95th percentile end-to-end request duration (http_server_request_duration_seconds). This covers the full round-trip through Tyk to upstream and back.

panels.title: P95 Gateway Latency
panels.description: 95th percentile time spent processing within Tyk Gateway (tyk_gateway_request_duration_seconds). Excludes upstream call time.

panels.title: P95 Upstream Latency
panels.description: 95th percentile time spent waiting for upstream service response (tyk_upstream_request_duration_seconds). High values indicate slow upstream services.

panels.title: Active APIs
panels.description: Number of distinct APIs receiving traffic (counted from tyk_api_id label)

panels.title: Request Rate by Status Class
panels.description: Request throughput broken down by HTTP status class. Powered by tyk_api_requests_total with http_response_status_code label — a new capability vs legacy Pump metrics.

panels.title: Request Rate by API
panels.description: Per-API request throughput over time. Use the API ID variable above to filter. tyk_api_id is a native OTel attribute — no Tyk Pump required.

panels.title: Latency Breakdown: Total vs Gateway vs Upstream (P95)
panels.description: NEW: Native OTLP metrics enable precise latency attribution. Total ≈ Gateway + Upstream. When Total spikes but Gateway stays flat → upstream issue. When Gateway spikes → Tyk processing bottleneck. Previously impossible with Tyk Pump alone.

panels.title: Latency Attribution: Gateway vs Upstream
panels.description: Average proportion of latency attributable to Gateway processing vs Upstream service. Helps identify where optimization effort should focus.

panels.title: Latency by API (P50 / P95 / P99) — Total, Gateway, Upstream
panels.description: Per-API latency breakdown across all three dimensions. Identify APIs with high upstream latency (upstream-side issue) vs high gateway latency (Tyk processing issue).

panels.title: Error Rate Over Time by Status Code
panels.description: 4xx and 5xx error rates over time. Stacked by status code to pinpoint which errors are dominant.

panels.title: Response Flag Distribution
panels.description: NEW: tyk_response_flag label reveals WHY a request failed, not just the HTTP code. 'URS' = Upstream 5xx, 'BD' = Bad Destination, '200'/'404' = successful codes. Enables precise error categorization.

panels.title: Status Code Distribution
panels.description: Total request count by HTTP status code over the selected time range.

panels.title: Top 10 APIs by Request Rate
panels.description: APIs with highest traffic volume. Identify hotspots using native tyk_api_id label.

panels.title: Top 10 APIs by P95 Latency
panels.description: APIs with highest tail latency. Candidates for optimization or upstream investigation.

panels.title: Top 10 APIs by Error Rate
panels.description: APIs with highest 5xx error rates. Use for SLO breach investigation.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by(tyk_api_id)(rate(tyk_api_requests_total{service_name=~"$service_name", http_response_status_code=~"5..", tyk_api_id=~"$api_id", http_request_method=~"$method"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by(tyk_api_id)(rate(tyk_api_requests_total{service_name=~"$service_name", tyk_api_id=~"$api_id", http_request_method=~"$method"}[$__rate_interval])) * 100)

panels.title: Request Rate by HTTP Method
panels.description: Traffic distribution across HTTP methods. http_request_method is a native OTel semantic convention attribute included in all Tyk OTLP metrics.

panels.title: P95 Latency by HTTP Method
panels.description: Latency percentiles split by HTTP method. Helps identify if specific methods (e.g. POST with large payloads) have higher latency than GET requests.

panels.title: Gateway Total Request Counter (tyk_http_requests_total)
panels.description: Raw gateway-wide request counter with no labels — the simplest possible OTLP metric. Useful for high-level throughput comparison with no cardinality overhead. Compare against tyk_api_requests_total sum to verify accounting.

panels.title: Request Rate vs Error Rate Correlation
panels.description: Overlay of request rate and error rate to identify if errors spike with traffic (capacity issue) or independently (service/config issue).

panels.title: ✦ Custom Dimensions — Configure Extra Labels from Any Source
How to Configure Custom Metric Dimensions
panels.description: Explains the opentelemetry.metrics.api_metrics gateway config schema for custom metric dimensions

panels.title: Metadata Dimensions — Path, Org, API Version, Scheme
Top Paths by Traffic
panels.description: Requires custom metric: {"name":"tyk.requests.by.route","type":"counter","dimensions":[{"source":"metadata","key":"route","label":"route"},{"source":"metadata","key":"api_name","label":"api_name"},{"source":"metadata","key":"method","label":"method"},{"source":"metadata","key":"response_code","label":"response_code"}]}

panels.title: Path Error Rate Over Time
panels.description: 4xx/5xx error rate per route. Requires tyk.requests.by.route custom counter with route and response_code dimensions.

targets.expr: sum by(listen_path, endpoint)(rate(tyk_requests_by_path_total{service_name=~"$service_name", response_code=~"[45]..", method=~"$method", api_id=~"$api_id"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by(listen_path, endpoint)(rate(tyk_requests_by_path_total{service_name=~"$service_name", method=~"$method", api_id=~"$api_id"}[$__rate_interval])) * 100

panels.title: Traffic by Organization
panels.description: Per-org request rate. Requires tyk.requests.by.org custom counter with org_id and api_name dimensions from metadata source.

panels.title: Traffic Share by API Version
panels.description: Request distribution across API versions. Helps track migration from v1→v2. Requires tyk.requests.by.version counter with api_version dimension from metadata.

panels.title: API Version Error Rate & Traffic
panels.description: Error rate and request count per API version. Requires tyk.requests.by.version counter with api_version and response_code dimensions.

targets.expr:
(
  sum by(api_version)(label_replace(rate(tyk_requests_by_version_total{service_name=~"$service_name", api_id=~"$api_id", response_code=~"5.."}[$__rate_interval]), "api_version", "No version", "api_version", "^$"))
  /
  (sum by(api_version)(label_replace(rate(tyk_requests_by_version_total{service_name=~"$service_name", api_id=~"$api_id"}[$__rate_interval]), "api_version", "No version", "api_version", "^$")) > 0)
  * 100
)
or
(
  sum by(api_version)(label_replace(rate(tyk_requests_by_version_total{service_name=~"$service_name", api_id=~"$api_id"}[$__rate_interval]) * 0, "api_version", "No version", "api_version", "^$"))
)

panels.title: HTTPS Traffic %
panels.description: Percentage of requests using HTTPS vs HTTP. Requires tyk.requests.by.route counter with scheme dimension from metadata source.

targets.expr:
sum(rate(tyk_requests_by_path_total{service_name=~"$service_name", scheme="https", method=~"$method", api_id=~"$api_id"}[$__rate_interval]))
/ (sum(rate(tyk_requests_by_path_total{service_name=~"$service_name", method=~"$method", api_id=~"$api_id"}[$__rate_interval])) > 0)
* 100
or vector(0)

panels.title: Requests by Scheme (HTTP vs HTTPS)
panels.description: Traffic volume split between HTTP and HTTPS. Requires tyk.requests.by.route counter with scheme dimension from metadata.

panels.title: Session Dimensions — Identity & Auth Tracking (api_key, oauth_id, portal)
Top API Keys by Traffic (last 6 chars)
panels.description: Requires: {"name":"tyk.requests.by.apikey","type":"counter","dimensions":[{"source":"session","key":"api_key","label":"api_key_suffix"},{"source":"metadata","key":"api_id","label":"api_id"}]}. Note: api_key is auto-truncated to last 6 characters by Tyk to control cardinality.

panels.title: API Key Traffic Over Time
panels.description: Per-API-key request volume over time. Shows traffic distribution across your API consumer base. Requires tyk.requests.by.apikey counter with session api_key dimension.

panels.title: OAuth Client Traffic
panels.description: Per-OAuth-client request rate. Identifies which OAuth applications are most active. Requires: {"name":"tyk.requests.by.oauth","type":"counter","dimensions":[{"source":"session","key":"oauth_id","label":"oauth_client_id"},{"source":"metadata","key":"api_id","label":"api_id"}]}

panels.title: OAuth Client Error Rate (Top 10)
panels.description: OAuth clients with highest 5xx error rates. Detect misbehaving integrations early. Requires tyk.requests.by.oauth counter with oauth_client_id and response_code dimensions.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by(oauth_client_id)(rate(tyk_requests_by_oauth_total{service_name=~"$service_name", response_code=~"5..", api_id=~"$api_id"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by(oauth_client_id)(rate(tyk_requests_by_oauth_total{service_name=~"$service_name", api_id=~"$api_id"}[$__rate_interval])) * 100)

panels.title: Portal App Usage Share
panels.description: Request distribution across Developer Portal applications. Requires: {"name":"tyk.requests.by.portal","type":"counter","dimensions":[{"source":"session","key":"portal_app","label":"portal_app"},{"source":"session","key":"portal_org","label":"portal_org"}]}

panels.title: Portal Org Traffic Trends
panels.description: Request rates per portal organization. Enables per-org usage reporting for multi-org portal deployments. Requires tyk.requests.by.portal counter with portal_org dimension.

panels.title: Per-Tenant Request Rate
panels.description: Request volume per tenant extracted from X-Tenant-ID request header. Zero backend changes needed. Requires: {"name":"tyk.requests.by.tenant","type":"counter","dimensions":[{"source":"header","key":"X-Tenant-ID","label":"tenant_id","default":"unknown"},{"source":"metadata","key":"api_id","label":"api_id"},{"source":"metadata","key":"response_code","label":"response_code"}]}

panels.title: Tenant Error Rate
panels.description: 5xx error rate per tenant. Enables per-tenant SLO monitoring from a single gateway metric — no backend instrumentation required. Requires tyk.requests.by.tenant with tenant_id + response_code.

targets.expr: sum by(tenant_id)(rate(tyk_requests_by_tenant_total{service_name=~"$service_name", response_code=~"5..", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id", api_id=~"$api_id"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by(tenant_id)(rate(tyk_requests_by_tenant_total{service_name=~"$service_name", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id", api_id=~"$api_id"}[$__rate_interval])) * 100

panels.title: Per-Tenant P95 Latency
panels.description: P95 latency ranked by tenant. Identify tenants experiencing degraded performance. Requires: {"name":"tyk.latency.by.tenant","type":"histogram","histogram_source":"total","dimensions":[{"source":"header","key":"X-Tenant-ID","label":"tenant_id","default":"unknown"},{"source":"metadata","key":"api_id","label":"api_id"}]}

panels.title: Tenant SLO Dashboard
panels.description: Per-tenant SLO summary: request rate, error rate, P50 and P95 latency. One row per tenant extracted from X-Tenant-ID header. The definitive multi-tenant observability panel.

panels.title: Per-Customer Request Rate
panels.description: Request rate per customer extracted from X-Customer-ID request header. Zero backend changes needed. Requires: {"name":"tyk.requests.by.customer","type":"counter","dimensions":[{"source":"header","key":"X-Customer-ID","label":"customer_id","default":"unknown"},{"source":"header","key":"X-Tenant-ID","label":"tenant_id","default":"unknown"}]}

panels.title: Top Customers by Traffic
panels.description: Top 10 customers by total request volume over the selected time range. Extracted from X-Customer-ID request header — no backend changes needed. Requires tyk.requests.by.customer instrument.

panels.title: Response Header Dimensions — Backend Intelligence (Cache, Version, Content-Type)
Cache Hit Rate
panels.description: Percentage of requests served from cache. Requires: {"name":"tyk.requests.with.cache","type":"counter","dimensions":[{"source":"response_header","key":"X-Tyk-Cached-Response","label":"cache_status","default":"0"},{"source":"metadata","key":"api_id","label":"api_id"}]}. cache_status="1" = cached, "0" = not cached. Note: response_header dims only populated on success path.

panels.title: Cache Status Over Time
panels.description: Cached (1) vs uncached (0) request rates over time. Track caching efficiency trends. Requires tyk.requests.with.cache counter with response_header X-Tyk-Cached-Response dimension.

panels.title: Cache Status Breakdown
panels.description: Total distribution of cache statuses over the selected time range. Requires tyk.requests.with.cache counter.

panels.title: Backend Version Distribution Over Time
panels.description: Tracks which backend versions are serving traffic. Enables canary/blue-green deploy monitoring without code changes. Requires: {"name":"tyk.requests.by.backend.version","type":"counter","dimensions":[{"source":"response_header","key":"X-Server-Version","label":"backend_version","default":"unknown"},{"source":"metadata","key":"api_id","label":"api_id"}]}

panels.title: Response Content-Type Mix
panels.description: Distribution of response content types. Detect unexpected content types that may indicate errors or misrouting. Requires: {"name":"tyk.requests.by.content.type","type":"counter","dimensions":[{"source":"response_header","key":"Content-Type","label":"content_type","default":"unknown"}]}

panels.title: 429 Rejection %
panels.description: Percentage of requests rejected with HTTP 429. 429s occur when quota is exhausted OR per-second rate limit is breached. X-RateLimit-* headers carry quota state (period-based budget); per-second rate limit has no response header.

panels.title: 429 Rejections Over Time
panels.description: Rate of HTTP 429 responses per API over time. Indicates quota exhaustion or per-second rate limit breaches.

panels.title: Top APIs by 429 Rejections
panels.description: Top 10 APIs generating 429 responses (quota exhaustion or rate limit breach).

panels.title: Error Rate by Flag (4xx+5xx)
panels.description: Rate of error responses (4xx+5xx) broken down by Tyk response flag. Uses http.server.request.duration histogram — pre-existing metric, no extra cardinality.

panels.title: Top APIs by Error Flag Count
panels.description: Top API + flag combinations by error count over the selected time range. Uses http.server.request.duration histogram count.
